# LS(1) — Terminal Depths Man Page

## NAME
  ls — list directory contents

## SYNOPSIS
  ls [OPTIONS] [ARGS]

## DESCRIPTION
List files and directories in a given path.

## OPTIONS
  -l  long format with permissions
  -a  show hidden files
  -h  human-readable sizes

## EXAMPLES
  ls /home/ghost
  ls -la /opt
  ls -lh /var/log

## ENVIRONMENT
  Terminal Depths v1.0 — cyberpunk hacking simulation

## SEE ALSO
  help, man, commands
